events.text: Assessment complete — the frayed/burned webbing on the fall protection equipment is a critical, automatic **fail**. Damaged webbing (cuts, burns, fraying) fails mandatory pre-use inspection under 1926.502(d) and 1910.140(c)(4) and must be immediately removed from service; no worker should tie off to it. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
